snapshot.scope: Independent Planning review binds the governed Settings/Onboarding and Activity/Knowledge/Reader owner documents, trace projections, and exact cumulative UI bytes at ac7513e on origin/main 0f023f9.

reviewers.task: Settings, onboarding, Activity, Knowledge Tree and Reader contract-impact review
reviewers.independence: Product Planning did not author the frozen UI candidate and independently compared its exact 15-path delta, owner contracts, trace evidence and unchanged delivery statuses before binding this snapshot.

dimensions.summary: Existing Onboarding, Settings and UI Prototype owners now carry the guided sequence, compact navigation and visible Reader/Knowledge boundaries without introducing a duplicate owner document.

Owner text and exact UI agree on language then optional Models then mandatory Vault, focus-owned compact Settings, renderer-local Knowledge views, single Reader title and fail-closed unresolved links.
Existing evidence selectors already cover the changed focused test files; every Requirement, Exit, Phase, open item, planned target and semantic-claim projection remains unchanged.

Focused regressions identify the guided first-run order, compact Settings focus ownership and Reader presentation while existing Knowledge Tree and Activity evidence retain their original service boundaries.
No new document, decision or trace projection was introduced; two existing owner documents and the review recipe carry the complete delta with no duplicated normative section.

verification.command: Independent exact-byte and owner-contract review of ac7513e based on origin/main 0f023f9
verification.evidence: The 15 candidate paths contain renderer, locale, style and UI-test bytes only; no main, preload, package, schema, service or durable-data owner changes are present.

verification.command: npm run verify:docs && npm run verify:decisions && npm run verify:traceability
verification.evidence: Links, whitespace, document map, PRD structure, 93 decision records and unchanged requirement/evidence mappings pass after the bounded owner synchronization.

verification.command: npm run verify:contracts && npm run verify:independent-documentation-review && npm run verify:documentation-leanness
verification.evidence: CON-001 through CON-004 remain green and the current recipe binds all governed roots plus every changed UI path without status promotion.

coordination.taskTitle: Settings and visible UI contract synchronization
coordination.compatibility: The candidate changes presentation and localized unavailable states only; no IPC, schema, service, durable storage, release scope, Requirement, Exit or Phase status changes.
coordination.acknowledgement: Product Planning synchronized the two existing UI/workflow owners and confirmed existing trace coverage; this review binds current bytes without promoting delivery status or claiming unavailable capabilities.

nonBlockingRisks: Activity Open remains a localized development affordance until a stable active-vault target projection exists; display labels never authorize navigation.
Unresolved Reader wiki/source links remain fail closed until the separately owned typed resolver is integrated; renderer hash mutation and heuristic identity matching stay forbidden.
Knowledge Tree Network/List and camera controls are renderer-local projections of the same body-free aggregate and do not prove force-graph analytics, new evidence, persistence or broader semantics.
Appearance, Local Capabilities, Agent Memory, Permissions, Skills, Packages and other unavailable Settings actions remain development-only unless an existing typed owner is bound.
Windows qualification, complete assistive-technology coverage, long-page Reader budgets and signed packaged visual acceptance remain open; no Requirement, Exit or Phase status is promoted.
